content: The Merriam-Webster definition of an agent as "an active cause that produces effect" frames the 2025 ICM curiosity-driven autonomous agent as a literal instantiation of this dictionary definition: intrinsic curiosity does not just power exploration for RL tasks, it lets the agent act as an independent active cause that generates its own meaningful effects in an environment, rather than only producing effects pre-specified by human reward designers. This recontextualization suggests ICM could be the core mechanism that bridges the abstract definition of a general agent and the engineering of truly autonomous AI agents.
